name: HRT_CHANNEL_MESSAGES
description: The table stores the email messages for each channel

columns.Name: MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of Channel Messages

columns.Name: MESSAGE_FROM
columns.Comments: Identify the Message Sender Email Address

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TO
columns.Comments: Identify the Receipient Channel, Foreign Key to the Channel

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Person

columns.Name: EMAIL_FROM
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email Sender's Email Address

columns.Name: EMAIL_TO
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email Receipient's Email Addressy

columns.Name: EMAIL_CC
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email CC Email Address

columns.Name: EMAIL_BCC
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email BCC Email Address

columns.Name: EMAIL_DATE
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email Date

columns.Name: EMAIL_SUBJECT
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email Subject

columns.Name: EMAIL_BODY
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Original Email Body

columns.Name: TAGS
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Tags Used for the Message

columns.Name: STAR
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Star Used in the Original Email

columns.Name: HASHTAGS
columns.Comments: Idenitfy the Hashtags Being Used in the Original Email

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Identify the Status of the Message

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Identify the Source of the Message

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_EXIST_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if attachment exists for the channel message.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
